functions.name: Sales Engine
functions.constraint: DC booking rate 11.8% (target 25%). Tom starts April 6. Anthony at 40% close rate. Rye coaching-focused, low volume. 92 warm contacts bounced off no-availability last week.
functions.key_metric: Close Rate: 40% (Anthony) | 100% (Tom, n=1) | 196 BCs MTD at $27.57 CPBC
functions.highest_leverage_task: Re-engage 92 warm contacts from last week + prep Tom's onboarding

functions.name: Mentor Journey
functions.constraint: No single owner. 63% of churned families never got a mentor. 36 families closed but not activated.
functions.highest_leverage_task: Brodie activation chase - daily list now automated (7:45am cron)

functions.name: Member Experience
functions.constraint: 4 past-due subs ($820 at risk). 60 collecting, 8 paused. Retention call engine live.
functions.highest_leverage_task: Harry makes 3 retention calls from hitlist - 49 renewals in 30 days

functions.name: Brand & Content
functions.constraint: Europe Readiness scored 1.5/5 for Brand & Content - biggest blocker to scale. All content still depends on Harry.
functions.key_metric: 18 newsletters awaiting review | Brand strategy PDF shipped | Brand Operator hire TBD
functions.highest_leverage_task: Brand Operator hiring decision this week
